name: @remudero/desktop
description: Tauri macOS shell (shell 1, MASTER-PLAN §7 W3-T3): wraps the SAME shell-0 web build (apps/dashboard) in a native shell -- menu-bar presence, launch-at-login, native notifications, a global hotkey, and deep links. Never forks the web code; see scripts/build-desktop-web.mjs and its --check drift gate for the byte-identity proof. See README.md for what this ships as a scaffold vs. what a local signed build still needs (Rust toolchain, Xcode, Apple Developer signing -- none available in the CI/agent sandbox that authored this).
